        writeAsvTsv
      • writeAsvTsv(path: string; res: DadaResult)

Imports

derep, learn_errors

Types

AsvRecord = object
  sequence*: string
  abundance*: int64
  clusterSize*: int
  centerUniqueIndex*: int
  firstSeenReadIndex*: int64
DadaOptions = object
  omegaA*: float64
  omegaC*: float64
  minAbundance*: int64
  minHamming*: int
  minFold*: float64
  maxClusters*: int
  maxIterations*: int
  maxShuffle*: int
  useQuality*: bool
  threads*: int
  parallelMinGroups*: int
DadaResult = object
  totalReads*: int64
  inputUniqueCount*: int
  asvCount*: int
  asvs*: seq[AsvRecord]
  uniqueToAsv*: seq[int]
  uniqueToCenterUnique*: seq[int]
  groupCount*: int
  iterationsRun*: int
  splitsAccepted*: int
  correctedUniques*: int
  uncorrectedUniques*: int
DadaSelfConsistOptions = object
  enabled*: bool
  minIterations*: int
  maxIterations*: int
  tol*: float64
  forceOmegaCZero*: bool
  finalDenoiseWithLatestErrors*: bool
DadaSelfConsistResult = object
  errorMatrix*: LearnErrorsResult
  dada*: DadaResult
  iterationsRun*: int
  converged*: bool
  maxAbsProbDelta*: float64
  assignmentChanges*: int

Procs

proc abundancePValue(reads: int64; expected: float64; prior = false): float64 {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc dadaDenoise(derepRes: DerepFastqResult; err: LearnErrorsResult;
                 opts: DadaOptions = defaultDadaOptions()): DadaResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError, KeyError, ValueError], tags: [TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc dadaSelfConsistent(derepRes: DerepFastqResult; learnOpts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions();
                        dadaOpts: DadaOptions = defaultDadaOptions(); scOpts: DadaSelfConsistOptions = defaultDadaSelfConsistOptions()): DadaSelfConsistResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc dadaSelfConsistentFromInitialErrors(derepRes: DerepFastqResult;
    initialErr: LearnErrorsResult;
    learnOpts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions();
    dadaOpts: DadaOptions = defaultDadaOptions();
    scOpts: DadaSelfConsistOptions = defaultDadaSelfConsistOptions()): DadaSelfConsistResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, KeyError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc defaultDadaOptions(): DadaOptions {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc defaultDadaSelfConsistOptions(): DadaSelfConsistOptions {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: DadaOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: DadaSelfConsistOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc estimateErrorMatrixFromDada(derepRes: DerepFastqResult;
                                 dadaRes: DadaResult; learnOpts: LearnErrorsOptions = defaultLearnErrorsOptions()): LearnErrorsResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: DadaOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: DadaSelfConsistOptions) {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc writeAsvTsv(path: string; res: DadaResult) {....raises: [IOError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
